name: Plimsoll Financial Guard
description: Deterministic financial security firewall for AI agents handling money. Five engines: loop detection, spend-rate limits, credential exfiltration defense, high-value confirmation gates, and amount anomaly detection. Zero-dependency, fail-closed.

maxVelocityCentsPerWindow.description: Maximum cumulative spend (in cents) within the velocity window

velocityWindowSeconds.description: Sliding window duration in seconds for velocity enforcement

loopThreshold.description: Number of identical tool calls before hard block

loopWindowSeconds.description: Sliding window duration in seconds for loop detection

confirmationThresholdCents.description: Per-transaction amount (in cents) that requires human confirmation. Set to 0 to disable.

anomalyMultiplier.description: Multiplier over rolling average that triggers anomaly friction

anomalyMinSamples.description: Minimum transaction count before anomaly detection activates

enabled.label: Enable Protection
enabled.help: Activate financial security checks on tool calls

maxVelocityCentsPerWindow.label: Velocity Cap (cents)
maxVelocityCentsPerWindow.help: Maximum cumulative spend in a sliding window before hard block

loopThreshold.label: Loop Threshold
loopThreshold.help: Identical calls within the window before hard block

confirmationThresholdCents.label: Confirmation Threshold (cents)
confirmationThresholdCents.help: Single-transaction amount requiring human approval. 0 = disabled.

anomalyMultiplier.label: Anomaly Multiplier
anomalyMultiplier.help: Flag transactions this many times above the rolling average

anomalyMinSamples.label: Anomaly Min Samples
anomalyMinSamples.help: Transactions before anomaly detection kicks in
